news.paragraph: Amazon is scaling its operational reach through the expansion of 30-minute delivery services in the U.S. and increased content investment in the French market. The company is also leveraging a new Swiss Franc bond offering to support its growing AI chip business and broader technological infrastructure. These strategic moves in logistics and artificial intelligence represent the primary drivers in recent news.
headlines: Amazon.com’s (AMZN) Prime Video Set to Invest 90 ​Million Euros in French Film and TV Production, Reuters Says
